name: elevated-ltv-missing-mortgage-statement
anchor: F1.FB loan-app fallback × F4.EL elevated band × DS=M1 interaction
rationale: Refi at 78% LTV with mortgage_statement missing. F1.FB falls back to loan_app source (per A33). F4.EL elevated-band callout fires. F2.DH should not activate (no discrepancy, just missing source). Tests three-way interaction: missing-doc fallback + elevated callout + no-hold-when-just-missing.
notes: Single-event sequence. Cross-family interaction without contradiction or correction — pure missing-doc + elevated-band stacking.
